result.leaderUserIntroduction:
Full join https://i.bybit.com/1Mclab9L?action=inviteToCopy

Tel time2make

Warning.
I don't have any accounts on Bybit with the same avatar or with name like "Anjuta".
All of these accounts are my copycats or scammers.
I will write about my other accounts here in the description.

Slow and steady wins the race.
The strategy is designed for 2+ months and 1000+$ capital.
Do not panic after drawdowns, they sometimes happen.
Who wants to enter for one week or a couple of days, please do not enter. All others are welcome!
